hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 1.65 km from property

snippets.snippet: Lokasi di tengah kota, mudah kemana mana.
Staff mau bantu bawain barang ramah.

address.address1: Jalan Teuku Muhammad Hasan No 99, Sukadamai, Lueng Bata, Banda Aceh, Aceh, Sumatera, 23123, Indonesia

advanceGuaranteeProgram.description: Agoda Preferred recommends trusted and verified properties that have a long-standing relationship with Agoda and meet certain criteria.

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 4-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

adult: Guests 7 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The direct drainage of the air conditioner into the bathroom makes the bathroom moldy and not cleaned beforehand. The hotel has four floors but does not have an elevator, so it's quite tiring to go up. Other than that, everything is fine, especially since it's close to various types of stores.
comments.reviewTitle: For a hotel with 4 floors, it is not suitable if there is no elevator.
comments.originalTitle: Untuk hotel dengan 4 lantai gak cocok jika tidak ada lift
comments.originalComment: Pembuangan air ac langsung ke kamar mandi, jadi kamar mandinya berlumut dan tidak dibersikan dulu, hotel dengan lantai 4 tapi tidak memiliki lift lumayan capek yaa naiknya. Yang lainnya aman sih apa lagi dekat dengan berbagai macam toko

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: THE BATHROOM SMELLS, THE FAUCET IS LEAKING EVERYWHERE, THE BLANKET AND SHEETS ARE NOT WASHED, SMELL OF STAIN AND STILL DIRTY. I LEFT AT NIGHT JUST BEFORE MY CHECKOUT TIME BECAUSE I COULDN'T STAY THERE UNDER SUCH CONDITIONS..PLEASE IF YOU INTEND TO RUN A HOTEL, FIX EVERYTHING!!!
comments.originalComment: KAMAR MANDI BAU, AIR DI KRAN BOCOR SEMUA, SELIMUT DAN SPREI TIDAK DI CUCI BAUK ILER DAN MASIH KOTOR. SAYA KELUAR MALAM SEGERA SEBELUM ABIS JADWAL CHEKOUT SAYA KARNA TIDAK SANGGUP MENGINAP DISANA DENGAN KEADAAN SEPERTI ITU..TOLONG KALAU NIAT BIKIN HOTEL DIPERBAIKI SEMUA!!!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: As soon as I entered, I was welcomed by very dirty and smelly footwear. Then the shower water in the bathroom leaked onto the outside floor, the blanket was torn, and the pillowcase had black stains. It was really disappointing.
comments.reviewTitle: I do not recommend, it's really bad!!
comments.originalComment: Baru masuk sudah di sambut dengan alas kaki yang kotor banget dan bau. Terus air mandii di kamar mandi rempes ke lantai luar, selimut nya robek2 dan sarung bantal nya bernoda hitam. Gak banget deh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Once we arrived there, we had to wait for 1 hour. The staff gave various reasons for not being able to check in. We were already tired from traveling all day and wanted to rest. The room was dirty and smelled bad. The parking space was narrow.
comments.originalComment: Sampai kesana malah harus nunggu sampai 1 jam.alasan macam2 dari staf belum boleh cekin.pdahal udah capek seharian perjalanan mau istirahat. Kamar kotor dan bau. Tempat parkir sempit.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: kebersihannya kurang but worth the money lah
